title: Freshener Household Toilet Deodorizer - Crystal bead aromatherapy, Aromatherapy Deodorizer for Long-Lasting Odor Elimination - Safe & Eco-Friendly (160g, 6x6x7cm)
features: 【Powerful & Long-Lasting Deodorization】This toilet deodorizer effectively captures and decomposes odor molecules such as ammonia and hydrogen sulfide, eliminating unpleasant smells at the source rather than just masking them. Thanks to advanced slow-release technology, the fragrance is evenly and slowly released over time, maintaining a consistent and pleasant aroma in your bathroom for an extended period.

【Multiple Fragrance Options】Choose from a carefully curated selection of delightful scents to suit your preference. Whether you prefer the fresh and elegant aroma of the ocean, the soothing and relaxing notes of lavender, or the classic fragrance of floral blends, there's a scent option for every taste. Each fragrance is designed to enhance yo

【Convenient & Easy to Use】The Freshener Household Toilet Deodorizer comes in both spray and gel forms, offering flexibility in how you use it. The spray type allows for precise control over the spraying range and dosage, ensuring even coverage in every corner of your bathroom. The gel type requires no manual operation; simply place it in the desired location, and it will automatically release its fragrance.

【Safe & Gentle on the Environment】This deodorizer is crafted with strict adherence to environmental and safety standards. It uses mild and non-irritating materials, making it safe for use in homes with children and pets. You can trust that this product not only effectively eliminates odors but does so in a way that's gentle on the environment and your household.

【Compact & Portable Design】With its small size (6x6x7cm) and lightweight (160g), this deodorizer is easy to place in any bathroom without taking up much space. Its compact design makes it portable, allowing you to move it between rooms or take it with you when traveling. Enjoy a fresh and fragrant bathroom wherever you go.
